name: Myanmar
headline: Myanmar FLOOR-STATE CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical. Junta forces launched large-scale ground offensives with air support toward Kyaukhtu and Saw in Magway Region; 20+ airstrikes reported in single day across Pauk, Myaing, Saw, Kyaukhtu townships. Massive ground build-up targeting southern Chin State. Junta continues pre-election (sham-elections) civilian-targeting campaign documented by Fortify Rights. Floor sustained.

BND.rationale: Floor sustained. 20+ airstrikes single-day in Magway Region; pre-election civilian-targeting (Fortify Rights: junta airstrikes killing civilians, destroying schools, churches, medical facilities) is canonical IHL-violation pattern.

evidence.finding: May 14: 20+ airstrikes single day across Pauk, Myaing, Saw, Kyaukhtu townships; junta ground offensive with air support toward Kyaukhtu and Saw in Magway Region.
Airstrikes and attacks continue as junta presses ahead with sham elections. Build-up targeting southern Chin State along Chin-Magway border.
Junta airstrikes killing civilians, destroying schools, churches, medical facilities ahead of sham elections — pattern of systematic civilian targeting.
World Report 2026: documented systematic atrocities, civilian targeting, denial of humanitarian access.

keyEvidence: Junta ground offensive with air support toward Kyaukhtu and Saw.
Pre-election sham-election civilian-targeting campaign (Fortify Rights tier-5).
rationale: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Junta's pre-election air/ground offensives sustain the canonical floor-anchor pattern (systematic civilian targeting, destruction of civilian infrastructure including schools/churches/medical facilities). Already at floor, no downward movement available. Math: 8/8 = 1.0 → ((1.0-1)/4)*100 = 0.0.
whyHeadline: Myanmar floor sustained; 20+ airstrikes single day in Magway; pre-election civilian-targeting campaign continues.

dominantDimension.note: BND remains canonical floor-anchor (systematic civilian-targeting, schools/churches/medical facility destruction).

boundaryWatchResolution: Floor state; no boundary movement available.
disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
